message:
test(ft-conformance): linalg.eigh numpy subprocess conformance [bd-c36b]

Adds torch_linalg_eigh_numpy_subprocess_conformance covering 8
symmetric matrices: identity 3x3, diagonal 4x4 (eigenvalues sorted
asc), scaled identity, SPD tridiagonal 4x4, mixed-sign 2x2
([1,2;2,-1] has eigenvalues ±√5), 3x3 with repeated eigenvalues
(degenerate subspace), 1x1 scalar, and a generic 2x2.

Eigenvectors have per-column sign ambiguity (different LAPACK
builds flip column signs) so the harness verifies three structural
invariants:
  - eigenvalues  ≈ numpy   (element-wise; eigh sorts ascending)
  - Q^T @ Q     ≈ I_n      (orthonormality)
  - Q diag(λ) Q^T ≈ A      (reconstruction)

Per-element relative tolerance of 1e-9.

Sister harness to the svd / qr / pinv / inv / solve / cholesky /
det / slogdet harnesses. Files closure for the eigh slice of
frankentorch-c36b.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
